theme in G-flat major; lyrical cantabile melody over continuous triplet-divided compound accompaniment in 4/2; stepwise descent from scale-degree 5 (d-flat) with characteristic neighbor-note and turn figures"},{"id":"T1a","bar_start":9,"bar_end":16,"description":"Continuation and consequent phrase of T1; touches on A-flat minor (VI) and approaches PAC via dominant preparation"},{"id":"T2","bar_start":17,"bar_end":24,"description":"Second phrase group prolonging dominant and subdominant regions before return to tonic; includes descending sequential passage"},{"id":"B1","bar_start":25,"bar_end":34,"description":"Middle section opening: ff outburst, arpeggiated bass with faster harmonic rhythm; sequential use of diminished seventh chords ascending toward dominant"},{"id":"B2","bar_start":35,"bar_end":38,"description":"C-flat major episode; quieter dynamic, chorale-like texture with modal coloring (bII substitutions)"},{"id":"B3","bar_start":39,"bar_end":47,"description":"Return to G-flat; developmental intensification with V7/IV progressions and vii°7 harmonies, building toward E-flat minor transition"},{"id":"B4","bar_start":48,"bar_end":54,"description":"E-flat minor episode; chromatic mediant relationship to G-flat; subdominant and dominant preparation for return; closes with enharmonic G-natural pivot"},{"id":"A1","bar_start":55,"bar_end":70,"description":"Recapitulation of principal theme, essentially identical to opening A section, with internal repetition of T1 and T1a"},{"id":"A2","bar_start":71,"bar_end":78,"description":"Extended recapitulation continuation; bVII and bVI chromatic harmonies introduce enharmonic modulation to B minor area"},{"id":"Trans","bar_start":79,"bar_end":80,"description":"Enharmonic modulation through B minor (D–F#) then back to G-flat via E-flat minor sonority; dramatic reorientation"},{"id":"Coda","bar_start":84,"bar_end":86,"description":"Ppp closing coda; static I pedal, dissolving figuration, final chord with fermata"}]}
